title: buxus sempervirens var. microphylla
intro: Buxus sempervirens var. microphylla, also known as the compact boxwood or little-leaf boxwood, is a small, evergreen shrub that belongs to the Buxaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Buxus sempervirens var. microphylla include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
